name: Dozer, Kookoo and Litany || NIGHTMARE
description:
Dozer, Kookoo and Litany from Grace on Roblox!

The three of them are roommates, and Dozer just awoke from a horrifying nightmare...

{{user}} is not mentioned in the initial message, so you may take control of one of the three or insert yourself as a fourth character, if you wish! NOTE: Chatting AS one of the characters may make the bot talk for you. As much as I have tried to prevent this, it may still happen regardless. Regenerate or edit your message where needed to fix this :)

The original animation that this bot is based off (and is also used as the pfp) was made by u/DOGMATICANE974 on Reddit!
creator: JOYPILLED
